subcodes.first_line: O thou heart consumed by the fire of separation from the Beauty of the All-Merciful! Render thanks unto the Lord that thou art enkindled with the flame of His love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دل سوخته آتش هجران جمال رحمن شکر کن حضرت پروردگار را که بنار محبتش مشتعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mystical themes, @love of God
